hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'specs/0[0-8]'; then npx tsx "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-status.ts" --specs-dir "$(pwd)/specs" 2>/dev/null; fi
